options.name: Ab-Henu
options.description: Decree of the Heart — warriors who bring the justice of Fate.

options.name: Ames-Ankh
options.description: Decree of the Pillar — architects who build and preserve.

options.name: Ba-Neterw
options.description: Decree of the Soul — priests who commune with the divine.

options.name: Kher-Minu
options.description: Decree of the Shadow — assassins who work in darkness.

options.name: Su-Menenu
options.description: Decree of the Name — scholars who protect knowledge.

options.name: Guild of Artisans
options.description: Craftsmen who create sacred relics and objects.

options.name: Guild of Avengers
options.description: Warriors who punish those who violate divine law.

options.name: Guild of Intermediaries
options.description: Diplomats who deal with the mortal world.

options.name: Guild of Judges
options.description: Magistrates who enforce the laws of Duat.

options.name: Guild of Merchants
options.description: Traders who gather resources and networks.

powers.label: Pillars
powers.description: Distribute 5 dots among your 5 Pillars. Your Decree and Guild determine which Pillars start highest — consult Mummy: the Curse for your starting allocations.

items.name: Sekhem
items.description: Raw divine power — the Mummy's core supernatural force.
